title: Home Screen - Onboarding in not displayed over DFU screens after connecting new device
scenario: Onboarding dialog is not displayed over DFU screens after connecting a new device; it only appears after DFU completes and the Close button is clicked.
steps: Start the app with a device and begin the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process.
Pair a new device that supports onboarding (Emu, Tern, Osprey) in phone settings.
Observe that the app remains on the DFU screen and the onboarding dialog for the newly connected device is NOT displayed.
Wait for DFU to finish and click the Close button.
Observe that the onboarding dialog should appear on the Home screen.
expected: The onboarding dialog should appear on the Home screen after DFU finishes and the Close button is clicked.
